seoTitle: Darbys Falls vs Dargan — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Darbys Falls and Dargan. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Darbys Falls vs Dargan: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Darbys Falls and Dargan.
heading: Darbys Falls vs Dargan — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Darbys Falls, New South Wales and Dargan, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dargan has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Darbys Falls (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Darbys Falls or Dargan safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Darbys Falls has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Dargan scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Darbys Falls scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Dargan scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Darbys Falls or Dargan?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dargan has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
